title: KKHSOU Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: KKHSOU Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: The officials of KKHSOU have released the KKHSOU Time Table 2026 for Degree and Master Degree Programmes. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

sections.heading: KKHSOU Time Table 2026 OUT

content.text: Krishna Kanta Handiqui State Open University has officially released the KKHSOU Time Table Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester 2026 for NEP Syllabus 2nd Cycle Examination 2026 on the official website - kkhsou.ac.in on 26-03-2026. The complete theory exam schedule is now available for all Degree and Master Degree programmes. Students can download the official PDF and check their subject-wise dates directly from the university portal. No login credentials are required to view or download the timetable. Always verify the exact dates and eligibility criteria mentioned in the official notification before preparing for the exams. In case of any discrepancy, contact the Controller of Examinations immediately.

sections.heading: KKHSOU Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester Exam Date 2026 Overview

content.text: The KKHSOU Time Table Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester 2026 covers NEP Syllabus examinations under the 2nd Cycle for both regular and back candidates. Theory exams will be held in April-May 2026 with clear subject-wise scheduling for undergraduate and postgraduate programmes.

rows: Krishna Kanta Handiqui State Open University (KKHSOU)

sections.heading: KKHSOU Time Table Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester 2026 PDF Download Link

content.text: Students can download the official KKHSOU Time Table Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester 2026 PDF from the Routine / Notice section on the university website. Separate timetables have been released for Degree and Master Degree programmes.
Direct Download Links (Official):

items: Degree 2nd Semester (NEP Syllabus) 2nd Cycle Examination 2026 PDF - Click Here
Master Degree 2nd Semester (NEP Syllabus) 2nd Cycle Examination 2026 PDF - Click Here

content.text: Download both PDFs and keep them safe for quick reference during exam preparation.

sections.heading: KKHSOU 2nd Semester Exam 2026 Important Dates

content.text: Here are the key dates from the KKHSOU Time Table Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester 2026. Students should mark these dates and plan their revision accordingly.

rows: Master Degree 2nd Semester Theory Exams Begin
To be notified on university website

sections.heading: KKHSOU Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester Subject Wise Exam Dates 2026

content.text: The KKHSOU Time Table Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester 2026 provides complete subject-wise dates for all programmes under NEP Syllabus. Degree students can check their BA, BBA, BCom and BCA papers while Master Degree students can refer to their respective programme schedule. All theory exams will be conducted in the morning session.

sections.heading: Degree 2nd Semester Subject Wise Dates 2026

rows: Mathematics: Abstract Algebra and Discrete Mathematics
Assamese: Adhunik Asomiya Sahityar Buranji (2000 khristabdoloi)

Nirbasito Asomiya Sahitya Path / General Principles of Writing / Education: Environmental Education / Issues in Development Communication / Perspective on Indian Economy / Introduction to Ethics / Understanding Social Problems / Introduction to Assam History (IDC2)
Tea Cultivation and Management / Electricity and Electrical Wiring (SEC2)
Modern Indian Language / Alternative English / Bengali (MIL) / Hindi (MIL) / Bodo (MIL) (AEC2)

sections.heading: Master Degree 2nd Semester Subject Wise Dates 2026

rows: Asomiya Sanskriti aru Gabeshana Pranali Porichoi
Prakriti Bigyan aru Asomiya Ruptattwa / Bhokti Sahitya / Sanskrit Sahityar Nirbasito Path
Political and Administrative History of India-II
Environmental History of India / Indian Administration
Social Entrepreneurship and Project Management / Indian Administration
Linux System Administration / System Analysis and Design

sections.heading: KKHSOU Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester Exam Timing & Shift Details 2026

content.text: All theory examinations under the KKHSOU Time Table Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester 2026 will be held in a single morning shift. Full papers are scheduled from 9:30 am to 12:30 pm and half papers from 9:30 am to 11:30 am. Practical examinations will start from 10 am onwards. Exact timings for each paper are clearly mentioned in the official PDF.

sections.heading: How to Download KKHSOU Time Table Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester 2026 Online

content.text: Students can download the KKHSOU Time Table Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester 2026 easily from the official university website without any login. The process takes less than a minute and gives you the complete official schedule instantly.

items: Visit the official website of Krishna Kanta Handiqui State Open University at kkhsou.ac.in.
Go to the Routine or Notice board section available on the homepage.
Look for the link titled Time Table for Degree 2nd Semester or Master Degree 2nd Semester (NEP Syllabus) 2nd Cycle Examination 2026.
Click on the required PDF notification to open it in your browser.
Review the full schedule and subject dates carefully on screen.
Download the PDF file and take a printout for easy reference during your exam preparation.

content.text: Always refer to the latest official timetable and keep a printed copy handy while revising for the examinations.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on KKHSOU Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester Time Table 2026

content.text: The official KKHSOU Time Table Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester 2026 PDF includes all essential information students need for smooth examination preparation.

items: Programme name and semester details (Degree / Master Degree)
NEP Syllabus and 2nd Cycle Examination 2026 specification
Exact exam dates and day of the week
Paper codes and full subject names
Examination timings for full and half papers
Instructions for regular and back candidates
Eligibility criteria based on enrollment number
Notes regarding practical examinations and centre changes

sections.heading: KKHSOU Degree and Master Degree 2nd Semester Exam Day Instructions 2026

content.text: Students must follow all guidelines issued by KKHSOU on the exam day. Carry your admit card and valid identity proof to the examination centre. Reach the venue well before the reporting time. Strictly avoid any prohibited items inside the examination hall. Follow the instructions printed on the question paper and the timetable. In case of any doubt, contact the university examination department or your study centre immediately.
